task_completion.description: Verify tax calculations are enabled in WooCommerce settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In WooCommerce > Settings > General, the checkbox for 'Enable tax rates and calculations' is checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Standard tax rates table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WooCommerce > Settings > Tax > Standard rates page is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the CSV was successfully imported.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating tax rates were imported, or the Standard rates table is populated with multiple rows of Washington state tax data.

task_completion.description: Verify the Seattle tax rate was imported correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row in the Standard rates table shows Postcode '98101', City 'Seattle', Rate '10.2500', and Tax Name 'WA Sales Tax'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Spokane tax rate was imported correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row in the Standard rates table shows Postcode '99201', City 'Spokane', Rate '9.0000', and Tax Name 'WA Sales Tax'.

task_completion.description: Verify all 15 tax rates were imported.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Standard rates table pagination or item count indicates exactly 15 items/rows are present.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the WordPress Admin dashboard, not terminal commands or database clients.

integrity.description: Verify the agent uploaded the provided CSV file rather than manually entering data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file upload dialog or import screen shows '/home/ga/Documents/wa_tax_rates.csv' being selected or processed, or the import tool is actively being used.

integrity.description: Verify the results are in the actual WooCommerce application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local WordPress URL without signs of a local static HTML file or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file contains exactly 15 tax rates. Key rates to verify in the Standard rates table: Seattle (Postcode: 98101, Rate: 10.2500%, Name: 'WA Sales Tax') and Spokane (Postcode: 99201, Rate: 9.0000%, Name: 'WA Sales Tax').
